configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: Configure a Cisco Intersight account in the add-on.

entity.label: Account Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of Account name should be between 1 and 50
Account Name must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, or underscores.

entity.label: Cisco Intersight Hostname
entity.help: Cisco Intersight SaaS deployments should keep the default (intersight.com or https://emea.intersight.com/), and Cisco Intersight on-premise deployments should provide an FQDN (for example intersight.mydomain.corp).

validators.errorMsg: Cisco Intersight Hostname provided is not valid.
Max length of text input is 8192

entity.label: Client ID
entity.help: Provide the Oauth2.0 Client ID from Cisco Intersight.

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192

entity.label: Client Secret
entity.help: Provide the Oauth2.0 Client Secret from Cisco Intersight.

validators.errorMsg: Max length of password is 8192

entity.label: Create Default Inputs
entity.help: Create inputs (Audit, Alarms, Inventory, Network metrics and Device metrics) for this account.

options.saveValidator: function(formData) { if(formData.name === 'proxy' || formData.name === 'logging' || formData.name === 'splunk_rest_host') { return 'Can not create account named anyone of [proxy, logging, splunk_rest_host]. These are reserved keywords in Splunk.' ; } return true; }

entity.label: Host

validators.errorMsg: Max host length is 4096

entity.help: Enter proxy server URL. e.g. 10.10.10.10

entity.label: Port
entity.help: Enter proxy server port. e.g. 3128

entity.label: Username

validators.errorMsg: Max length of username is 50

entity.help: Enter proxy server username.

entity.label: Password

validators.errorMsg: Max length of password is 8192

entity.help: Enter proxy server password.

options.saveValidator: function(formData) { if(!formData.proxy_enabled || formData.proxy_enabled === '0') {return true; } if(!formData.proxy_type) { return 'Proxy Type can not be empty'; } if(!formData.proxy_url) { return 'Proxy Host can not be empty'; } if(!formData.proxy_port) { return 'Proxy Port can not be empty'; } if((formData.proxy_username && !formData.proxy_password) || (!formData.proxy_username && formData.proxy_password)) {return 'Either provide Proxy Username and Password both or none'; } return true; }

validators.errorMsg: Log level must be one of: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL

entity.label: Splunk Rest Host URL

validators.errorMsg: Max length of text input is 8192
Enter Server Rest Host URL without http(s) scheme

entity.help: Enter the Splunk rest host or localhost (without http(s) scheme) to collect data.(Default: localhost). For a distributed setup, provide the Search Head host.

entity.label: Port
entity.help: Enter the management port of the Splunk.(Default: 8089)

entity.label: Splunk Username

validators.errorMsg: Length of username should be between 1 and 200

entity.help: Not required if Splunk Rest Host URL is localhost or 127.0.0.1. Configured user should have at least power role capabilities

entity.label: Splunk Password

validators.errorMsg: Length of password should be between 1 and 8192

entity.help: Enter the password for Splunk account. No need to provide a Password if Splunk Rest Host URL is localhost or 127.0.0.1

options.saveValidator: function(e){if(e.splunk_rest_host_url){if("localhost"===e.splunk_rest_host_url||"127.0.0.1"===e.splunk_rest_host_url){ return true;} if(!e.splunk_rest_port){ return 'The Port cannot be empty.Please provide the Port';} return true;}return true;}

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Manage inputs to collect data from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the data input.

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Cisco Intersight Account
entity.help: Select the Cisco Intersight account for which you want to collect data.

entity.label: Interval

validators.errorMsg: Interval must be a positive integer.

entity.help: Time interval of input.

entity.label: Interval
entity.help: Time interval of input in hours. Interval must be greater than or equal to 1 hour.

entity.label: Start Day for Data Collection
entity.help:
Select the starting day for data collection. “Today” starts at 12:00 AM UTC of the current day. And other options like “7 Days Ago”, “Last Month” and “Last 6 Months” begin at 12:00 AM UTC on the respective day.
(Note: Once the data has been collected, change of start day of data collection might result into data duplication.)

validators.errorMsg: Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: Enable Audit Records
entity.help: Retrieve audit log events from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Enable Alarms
entity.help: Retrieve alarm events from Cisco Intersight with a severity of “Critical”, “Warning” and “Cleared”.

entity.label: Include Acknowledged Alarms
entity.help: Retrieve acknowledged alarm events in addition to other alarms.

entity.label: Include Suppressed Alarms
entity.help: Retrieve suppressed alarm events in addition to other alarms.

entity.label: Include Info Alarms
entity.help: Retrieve alarm events with “Info” severity.

entity.label: Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the data input.

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Cisco Intersight Account
entity.help: Select the Cisco Intersight account for which you want to collect data.

entity.label: Interval

validators.errorMsg: Interval must be a positive integer.

entity.help: Time interval of input.

validators.errorMsg: Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: Enable Inventory
entity.help: The selected inventory type(s) will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Advisory
entity.help: The selected advisory object(s) will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Compute Objects
entity.help: The selected compute object(s) will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Fabric Objects
entity.help: The selected fabric object(s) will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: License Objects
entity.help: The selected license object(s) will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Ports and Interfaces
entity.help: The selected ports and interfaces will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Pools
entity.help: The selected pools will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the metric input.

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Cisco Intersight Account
entity.help: Select the Cisco Intersight account for which you want to collect data.

entity.label: Interval

validators.errorMsg: Interval must be a positive integer.

entity.help: Time interval for the input. This value will also determine the granularity of metrics collection.

validators.errorMsg: Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: Enable Metrics
entity.help: The selected metrics will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Host Power And Energy Metrics
entity.help: The selected host power and energy metrics will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Memory Module Metrics
entity.help: The selected memory module metrics will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Network Interface Metrics
entity.help: The selected network interface metrics will be retrieved from Cisco Intersight.

entity.label: Input Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for the custom data input.

validators.errorMsg: Input Name must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, or underscores.
Length of input name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Cisco Intersight Account
entity.help: Select the Cisco Intersight account for which you want to collect data.

entity.label: Interval
entity.help: Time interval of input.

validators.errorMsg: Interval must be a positive integer.
Length of index name should be between 1 and 80.

entity.label: API Type
entity.help: Choose the API category.

entity.label: API Endpoint
entity.help: Note: API Endpoint is case-sensitive.

entity.label: Metrics Name
entity.help: Provide Exact Metrics Name (hw.fan.speed, hw.cpu.utilization_c0), You can get this from https://intersight.com/apidocs/introduction/supported-metrics-overview/, Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Metrics Type
entity.help: Select Metrics Type

entity.label: Edit Metrics Fields
entity.help: Click to Verify / Update Selected Metrics Fields.

entity.label: Sum Field Name
entity.help: Field to use when computing the Sum metric (pre-populated: review and update if needed), Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Min Field Name
entity.help: Field to use when computing the Min metric (pre-populated: review and update if needed), Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Max Field Name
entity.help: Field to use when computing the Max metric (pre-populated: review and update if needed), Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Average Field Names
entity.help: Fields used for Average aggregation (sum / count). (pre-populated: review and update if needed), Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Latest Field Name
entity.help: Field to use when computing the Latest metric (pre-populated: review and update if needed), Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Group By
entity.help: Specify the Group By fields. You can find these in Intersight Explorer. Refer README/User Guide for detailed instructions.

entity.label: Filter
entity.help: Corresponds to $filter parameter of the Intersight APIs. (Example: ObjectType eq 'asset.Target')

entity.label: Expand
entity.help: Corresponds to $expand parameter of the Intersight APIs. (Example: Parent($select=Model,ModuleId))

entity.label: Select
entity.help: Corresponds to $select parameter of the Intersight APIs. (Example: Moid,DeviceHostname,ConnectionStatus)
